Rfmalloc 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

Rfmalloc-package Rfmalloc
Rfmalloc: Memory-Mapped File Allocation for R
as_fmalloc_array()
Convert a vector to fmalloc array metadata
as_fmalloc_data_frame()
Convert to data.frame for fmalloc vectors
as_fmalloc_matrix()
Convert a vector to fmalloc matrix metadata
cleanup_fmalloc()
Clean Up fmalloc
create_fmalloc_array()
Create Array Using fmalloc
create_fmalloc_data_frame()
Construct data.frame from fmalloc columns
create_fmalloc_matrix()
Create Matrix Using fmalloc
create_fmalloc_vector()
Create Vector Using fmalloc
destroy_fmalloc_vector()
Explicitly destroy a fmalloc vector
diagnose_fmalloc_runtime()
Diagnose fmalloc runtime state
fmalloc_api_version() fmalloc_default_runtime() is_fmalloc_runtime() is_fmalloc_vector() fmalloc_runtime() fmalloc_runtime_info() fmalloc_vector_info() fmalloc_vector_type() fmalloc_vector_length() fmalloc_vector_payload_ptr()
Public Rfmalloc API helpers
fmalloc_matmul_backend() fmalloc_matmul_backends()
Pluggable matrix-multiply backend
fmalloc_bed()
PLINK 1 genotypes as a 2-bit fmalloc tensor
fmalloc_bed_standardize()
Bake per-variant standardization into a bed tensor
fmalloc_colVars() fmalloc_rowVars()
Column / row variances of an fmalloc matrix
fmalloc_dosage()
Fractional genotype dosages as a 1-byte fmalloc tensor
fmalloc_dosage_standardize()
Bake per-variant standardization into a dosage tensor
fmalloc_hap_materialize()
Materialize a bit-packed haplotype store into a 0/1 matrix
fmalloc_haplotypes() dim(<fmalloc_haplotypes>) print(<fmalloc_haplotypes>)
Phased haplotypes as a 1-bit fmalloc store
fmalloc_set() fmalloc_fill() fmalloc_add() fmalloc_sub() fmalloc_mul() fmalloc_div()
In-place (by-reference) mutation of fmalloc vectors
fmalloc_ld() dim(<fmalloc_ld>) print(<fmalloc_ld>)
Banded LD (correlation) matrix as a compressed fmalloc store
`%*%`(<fmalloc>) crossprod(<fmalloc>) tcrossprod(<fmalloc>) matrixOps(<fmalloc>)
Matrix algebra for fmalloc-backed vectors and matrices
fmalloc_matmul_ooc() fmalloc_crossprod_ooc() fmalloc_tcrossprod_ooc()
Out-of-core matrix product for fmalloc matrices larger than RAM
fmalloc_pca()
Out-of-core PCA / truncated SVD for fmalloc matrices
rowSums() colSums() rowMeans() colMeans()
Matrix reduction helpers for fmalloc-backed matrices
fmalloc_sync()
Flush an fmalloc runtime's backing store to disk
fmalloc_tensor_codecs() create_fmalloc_tensor() as_fmalloc_tensor() fmalloc_tensor_dtype() fmalloc_tensor_materialize() dim(<fmalloc_tensor>) print(<fmalloc_tensor>) `%*%`(<fmalloc_tensor>) matrixOps(<fmalloc_tensor>) crossprod(<fmalloc_tensor>) tcrossprod(<fmalloc_tensor>)
Typed fmalloc tensors
init_fmalloc()
Initialize fmalloc
ld_col()
Neighbour run of one column of a banded LD store
ld_ncol()
Number of variants in a banded LD store
ld_pair()
Correlation between two variants of a banded LD store
list_fmalloc_allocations()
List Persistent fmalloc Allocations
open_fmalloc()
Open an fmalloc Runtime

Developed by Sounkou Mahamane Toure.
